name: Crayfish & Poached Quail Eggs Salad #t Truffle Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------COURT BOUILLON-------------------------------
1 gallon water
8 onions, sliced
8 carrots, sliced
10 peppercorns
2 bay leaves
Salt (to taste)
2 garlic cloves, peeled
Pepper (to taste)
-----------------------------------SALAD-----------------------------------
1 gallon court bouillon
16 crayfish tails
1 Belgian endive, head
1 red chicory, head
Vinaigrette:
============
Combine truffles, shallots, dill, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Whisk together.
Court Bouillon:
===============
Coarsely chop the vegetables. Place all ingredients in a pot and cover with water. Cook over medium heat for 20-30 minutes. Strain.
Salad:
======
Poach quail eggs in boiling water with a touch of vinegar until soft. Cool in ice water. Arrange endive and red chicory on plate. Decorate with poached eggs and crayfish tails. Serve vinaigrette on side.
